title: Acosmium brachystachyum
taxonomy: Acosmium brachystachyum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, which is commonly known as the legume or pea family. This classification places Acosmium brachystachyum within the subfamily Faboideae, a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their pea-like flowers and seed pods. The genus Acosmium is a small group of plants that are native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Acosmium brachystachyum is further classified as a member of the tribe Dalbergieae, which is a group of legumes that are characterized by their distinctive seed pods and flowers. The specific classification of Acosmium brachystachyum is Acosmium brachystachyum (Benth.) Hutch., but this can vary slightly depending on the source.
